name: Viabhron
description: A modular AI Operating System (MAOS) with a persistent agentic office, a generative UI desk, and a secure tent-deployment model. Now featuring Luma Uni-1, Trustpilot AI Visibility, Hardened Flowise AI, a Global Security Radar, an Ethical Sentinel, a Parallel Forge, a Corporate Governance Hub, a Sovereign I/O Bridge, an Agent Registry, Substack Publishing, x402 Payment Gateway, and Sovereign Identity Bridge.
